description: The dataset '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv' containing Big Five Inventory personality data is open in Jamovi. Calculate an 'Extraversion_Score' and compare it across genders. The 'Extraversion_Score' should be the mean of items E1, E2, E3, E4, and E5, with E1 and E2 reverse-coded on a 1-6 scale. Perform an Independent Samples T-Test with 'Extraversion_Score' as the dependent variable and 'gender' as the grouping variable, including effect size (Cohen's d) and group descriptives. Save the project as '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Extraversion_Gender_Analysis.omv'.
